name: fclt
description: Codex workflows and MCP tools for fclt setup, writeback, evolution, and capability review.

interface.longDescription: Install and operate fclt from Codex: initialize AI capability roots, inspect setup health, record writebacks, review evolution proposals, and keep skills, snippets, instructions, automations, and MCP surfaces improving over time.
defaultPrompt: Use fclt to check this repo's AI capability setup.
Record useful fclt writeback from this work.
Review fclt evolution proposals and next actions.
